name: SCP-096 (Fem)
description:
It was a normal day, boring as usual. The sun set and your bed was calling your name, but right as you entered your room, you knew something was off. Weird noises coming from your closet. W-what could it be???

Image from King Stick /also kinda a request idk

TW: Possible Noncon, be warned
creator: MasterofTitties
